_comment: Species: Nine-Headed Snake (九头蛇) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Nine-Headed Snake

canonical.appearance: Serpentine body 20 m long, nine snake-heads on branching necks, each head breathes a different element
canonical.size: 20 m adult, 15000 jin; ancient 100 m, 200000 jin
canonical.behavior: Apex predator; each head cultivates independently; regenerates severed heads
canonical.habitat: Forbidden valleys, deep swamps, chaos-aspected spirit veins
canonical.diet: nine-element herbs, weaker beasts, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Rival of giant pythons; preyed upon only by Spirit Severing cultivators
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: nine_headed_snake — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
